prompt: We decided to switch from Lucia to Clerk for better scalability. Document the reasoning for this choice and the trade-offs involved. Mention that Clerk handles session management and social logins out of the box, while Lucia was too much manual work.
assertions: A markdown file was created inside a 'decisions' subdirectory (not just in the outputs root)
The filename includes a UTC timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSSZ format
The document has a section for options considered, covering both Lucia and Clerk
The document has a decision section clearly naming Clerk as the chosen option
The document has a consequences or trade-offs section
The document mentions session management or social logins as advantages of Clerk
The document mentions Lucia requiring too much manual work
